nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=110 beats='Maya and her dog Biscuit slip into the sea caves under the old lighthouse at low tide; three dark openings breathe cool air and throw back echoes; she must choose which echo to follow before the tide turns'>>

choices.label: Follow the humming echo to the left.
Follow the dripping echo to the right.
Follow the whispering echo straight down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the left passage narrows into a low tunnel that hums like a held note; Biscuit's ears prick; Maya edges forward toward a distant glow and a soft rustling'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the tunnel splits: to one side a wall glitters faintly, to the other the humming grows into a warm murmur'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the glittering wall is flecked with tiny quartz that catches Maya's torchlight; the floor slopes gently down toward a narrow crack breathing cold air'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the slope opens into a small antechamber; a crack in the far wall glows with a soft blue light and the air smells of clean wet stone'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the crack is just wide enough to squeeze through, but water is beginning to pool at Maya's boots; she can squeeze on or turn back to the mouth'>>

choices.label: Turn back before the water rises.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Maya and Biscuit splash back to the cave mouth as the shallow water rises around their ankles; they reach daylight damp, muddy, and safe, promising to come back at the next low tide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they wriggle through the cool crack and pop out the other side; Biscuit shakes off and the blue glow brightens ahead into a wide shimmering room'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='a crystal grotto: walls studded with glowing crystals throw blue light everywhere; one loose crystal sits at eye level, and a deeper archway hums invitingly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='Maya eases the loose crystal free; it fits her palm and glows softly, lighting a low passage that seems to curve back toward the lighthouse stairs'>>

choices.label: Follow the crystal's light back up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the glowing crystal lights their way up a stone stair to a little door behind the lighthouse; Maya steps into the evening with a real cave-crystal cupped in her hands and Biscuit at her heels'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the archway hum grows into a chord; the passage widens and the crystals thin out, replaced by smooth ribbed walls that seem shaped to carry sound'>>

choices.label: Follow the chord toward the sound.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='ahead the walls curve into a great round chamber; every drip and footstep rings and layers into music; Biscuit gives a wondering whine that echoes like a choir'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Maya sings a single note and the whole chamber sings it back in shimmering harmony; she has found the chamber that sings, a secret only the old lighthouse keeper once knew, and hums all the way home'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the warm murmur leads down a rounded passage; the sound is not wind but something ringing, like a struck bell far below; Biscuit pads ahead confidently'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the passage steepens; the ringing steadies into a slow, deep chime, and pale light leaks up from a chamber below where something metal catches the glow'>>

choices.label: Climb down toward the chiming light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='a rope ladder left by someone long ago dangles into the chamber; the tide-clock in Maya's head says time is short; she can climb down or scramble back up while she still can'>>

choices.label: Climb down the old rope ladder.
Scramble back up to be safe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Maya decides the chime can wait for a safer day; she and Biscuit climb back up the rounded passage and out to the mouth, salt-damp and a little breathless but perfectly safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the ladder holds; at the bottom a huge old ship's bell, green with age, hangs from a natural arch, still faintly ringing as slow drips strike its rim'>>

choices.label: Walk up to the great bell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='letters are cast around the bell's lip, the name of a ship lost a hundred years ago; behind it a dry ledge holds a rusted lantern and a coil of good rope'>>

choices.label: Read the name and look behind the bell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='Maya copies the ship's name into her notebook; the lantern still has a stub of candle, and the coil of rope could help them climb out the way they came'>>

choices.label: Take the lantern and rope and head out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='with the rediscovered bell's name safe in her notebook and the old lantern lit, Maya and Biscuit climb the rope back to daylight; the whole town will want to hear about the lost ship that still rings under the sea'>>

ending.title: The Bell of the Lost Ship

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the right passage drips steadily; Maya's torch shows wet black walls and a trickle running deeper into the dark; the air turns cold and briny'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the trickle reaches a split: one way the sound of water grows into a hollow lapping, the other way a sharp briny smell drifts from a low side-tunnel'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the lapping grows louder; the passage floor turns to smooth wet pebbles and the ceiling lifts away into darkness Maya's torch cannot reach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the pebbles give way to a shelf of rock above black, still water that stretches out of sight; the lapping is only Biscuit's paw testing the cold edge'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the shelf narrows and turns slick with weed; below, the underground lake waits; Maya can climb carefully down to its shore or back off before someone slips'>>

choices.label: Climb down to the lake shore.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='the weed-slick rock is too risky; Maya coaxes Biscuit back along the shelf and they retrace the drip to the cave mouth, arriving damp and muddy but safe, the black lake left for braver boots'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they pick their way down to a pale gravel shore beside the vast still lake; the water is glassy and cold, and something long and dark rests half-pulled onto the gravel'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the dark shape is an old wooden rowboat, cracked but whole; further along, the shallows glow faintly where the water is only ankle-deep'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the rowboat still has its oars lashed inside; Maya tips out the rainwater, and the little craft floats, rocking gently, ready to carry them across the mirror-black lake'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='Maya rows Biscuit across the silent lake to a shelf of glimmering rock where a natural chimney lets in a coin of daylight; they climb out into the dunes, the first people in a lifetime to cross the lighthouse lake'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the shallows glow because thousands of tiny pale shells carpet the bottom, lighting up as Maya's feet stir them; the glow leads toward a low, bright opening'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the shells lead to a tiny islet of white sand under a shaft of open sky, ringed by glowing water like a secret pool; Maya fills a jar with the pale shells and wades back up into the daylight, sworn to keep the place secret'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the briny side-tunnel is tight and smells of salt and seaweed; Maya crouches under dripping ledges while Biscuit squeezes ahead toward a paler light'>>

choices.label: Crouch through toward the pale light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the tunnel opens a little; strands of green weed hang from the ceiling and a shallow channel of clear seawater runs along the floor toward a rounded chamber'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the channel leads to a curtain of hanging weed; beyond it the light is bright and watery; but the incoming tide is filling the channel behind them, and Maya must choose quickly'>>

choices.label: Hurry back before the channel fills.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Maya will not risk the rising channel; she and Biscuit hurry back the way they came and reach the mouth as the sea pours in behind them, wet to the knees, hearts thumping, entirely safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='through the weed the chamber opens into a bright hidden tide-pool, its water so clear it looks like air; anemones and darting fish fill the rocky bowl'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the tide-pool is a whole tiny world; in one corner a rare cushion starfish glows orange, and on the far side a crab-track leads to a deeper, darker basin'>>

choices.label: Look closely at the orange starfish.
Follow the crab-track to the dark basin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the cushion starfish is bigger than Maya's hand and the deep orange of a sunset; she sketches it carefully, leaving it exactly where it clings, and photographs the glowing pool'>>

choices.label: Finish the sketch and slip out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Maya backs out of the tide-pool with a page full of drawings of the rare orange starfish; the rockpool society will not believe her until they see the sketch, and she and Biscuit climb out grinning'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the crab-track leads to a darker basin where the water is deep green; something smooth and pale gleams at the bottom, half-buried, catching the last of the light'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='Maya lifts out a perfect spiral shell as big as her two hands, its inside pearled pink; it is the finest thing she has ever found, and she carries it up into the daylight like a trophy, Biscuit barking proudly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the straight-down passage is the darkest; the whispering echo turns out to be a draft over stone; Maya keeps one hand on the wall and Biscuit close as they descend'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the dark passage forks: from one branch comes a papery squeaking and flutter, from the other the creak of old wood and a glint of rusted iron'>>

choices.label: Go toward the squeaking and flutter.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the squeaking gets busier; the ceiling lifts and Maya's torch catches hundreds of small folded shapes hanging above; Biscuit presses to her leg, uncertain'>>

choices.label: Creep on under the hanging shapes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they are bats, roosting in a great vaulted chamber, twitching in their sleep; the air is warm and smells earthy, and a faint circle of grey light shows high in the roof'>>

choices.label: Move quietly toward the grey light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the grey light is a shaft in the roof, maybe a way up and out; but reaching it means crossing right under the sleeping bats; Maya can tiptoe on or back away and leave them in peace'>>

choices.label: Back away and leave the bats be.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Maya will not risk waking the whole sleeping roost; she and Biscuit ease back out of the warm chamber and return along the dark passage to the mouth, dusty and awed and safe'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='they cross on soft feet; not a bat stirs; beneath the shaft a jumble of fallen rock makes a rough staircase toward the circle of daylight far above'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the rock stair is steep but solid; halfway up Maya finds an old carved arrow and initials, proof that someone climbed this secret chimney long before her'>>

choices.label: Climb on past the old carving.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the shaft narrows to a mossy funnel; green light and the smell of grass pour down; Maya boosts Biscuit ahead and hauls herself up the last mossy metres'>>

choices.label: Push up through the mossy funnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='they climb out through a hidden hole in the clifftop meadow, high above the lighthouse, blinking in the sun; Maya has found a secret way in and out of the caves, and a whole colony of bats to tell the museum about'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the creaking wood grows nearer; Maya's torch finds broken barrel-staves and a leaning door of grey planks wedged into a side-cave, iron nails weeping rust'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the old door swings with a groan; behind it a dry hollow has been walled off by hand, a hiding place, with the shapes of stacked crates in the shadows'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='it is a smuggler's old cache, forgotten for a century; but the tide is turning and the floor already glistens wet; Maya can step inside for a quick look or leave the crates for another day'>>

choices.label: Step in for a quick look.
Leave the cache and beat the tide.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='the wet floor decides it; Maya marks the spot on her map and hurries out with Biscuit ahead of the rising tide, reaching the mouth breathless, muddy, and safe, the cache saved for a drier day'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='inside, the crates are furred with dust; most have rotted to splinters, but two smaller boxes sit dry on a stone shelf, their lids stiff but whole'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the first box holds a green-crusted brass compass; the second is heavy and rattles like coins; the water is creeping in, and Maya can only carry one out cleanly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Maya wipes the compass; under the crust its needle still swings true, pointing her the quickest way back toward the cave mouth and the fading daylight'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='the century-old compass leads them straight out to the mouth just as the sea returns; Maya carries a real smuggler's compass that still finds north, and a story the whole town will beg to hear'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the heavy box is full of blackened old coins, foreign faces stamped in silver; Maya cannot count them now, but she can carry the whole box if she goes at once'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='Maya lugs the box of tarnished coins up to daylight just ahead of the tide; the museum will polish them and put her name on the little card, the girl who found the lighthouse smugglers' hoard'>>
